title: The Time Warp Extravaganza A Rocky Horror Drag Dance Spectacle
description: THE TIME WARP EXTRAVAGANZA: A Rocky Horror Drag and Dance Spectacle ★★★★★ review. Step into the world of Rocky Horror at this unforgettable drag & dance show. Fierce, fabulous, and filthy in all the right ways! A full-throttle celebration of everything that makes Rocky Horror Picture Show a cult phenomenon. Audience participation highly encouraged. Get ready to sing along with your favourite songs, dress up in your wildest Rocky Horror outfits, and immerse yourself in a night of pure fun and flamboyance. Whether you're a die-hard fan or new to the madness, this is one extravaganza you won’t want to miss! This isn't just a show—it is a cultural reset. Equal parts wild, wicked, and wonderful, it proves that Rocky Horror is still the bold, beating heart of queer theatre—and that drag, at its best, is an unstoppable force of expression and joy. It doesn't just reimagine the iconic story—it reinvents it for a new generation of misfits. this spectacle demands to be seen!
